title: erodium boissieri
intro: Erodium boissieri, also known as Boissier's Storksbill, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erodium boissieri include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Erodium boissieri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
